title: Onebox
description: OneInbox is an advanced, unified omnichannel communication platform that centralizes messages from various channels like WhatsApp Business, Instagram, Facebook Messenger, and Email into a single dashboard, allowing support teams to manage and reply to all customer conversations without switching apps. The application features an AI-powered "Smart Priorities" engine that automatically analyzes message intent to classify conversations into Urgent, Priority, or Needs Response queues based on critical customer actions such as refund requests or bulk orders. Additionally, it integrates an in-depth Customer History CRM that displays rich contextual data right alongside the chat—including contact details, order frequency, and financial metrics like Lifetime Value (LTV)—while offering a robust Ticket Status Tracking system, granular notification preferences, secure Google SSO authentication, and seamless Light/Dark theme switching to dramatically slash business response times.

title: Homevista
description:
This project is a high-performance, full-stack real estate platform inspired by the core functionalities of Zillow, but heavily enhanced with tailored, localized discovery features. While it offers standard Zillow capabilities—such as property listings, advanced filtering, and interactive mapping—it addresses a critical gap in traditional real estate applications: proactive opportunity tracking.

Through an innovative "Smart Area & Society Intel" engine, the platform allows users to select specific geographical regions or housing sectors to receive dynamic, real-time alerts on upcoming housing schemes, infrastructure updates, and deep price-drop analytics. Instead of just browsing what is currently on the market, users get a predictive look at where the market is moving next.

title: Healthcare Enterprise Suite
description: A comprehensive enterprise-grade healthcare platform built for global deployment. Engineered real-time smart alert systems, Caller modules, MDT (Multi-Disciplinary Team) collaboration tools, EPCR (Electronic Patient Care Reporting), and advanced Patient Reports. The platform integrates with FHIR standards for seamless interoperability across healthcare systems and supports thousands of concurrent users.

title: Fashion Valley (AI E-Commerce)
description: An AI-powered fashion e-commerce platform featuring personalized product recommendations using the Apriori Algorithm for association rule mining. Built a visual image-upload search engine that lets users find similar products by uploading a photo. Integrated real-time inventory management, dynamic pricing, and a Firebase-backed user behavior analytics dashboard.
